narration: Import the argparse module to enable command-line argument parsing.
Create an instance of the ArgumentParser class and assign it to a variable named parser.
Set the description attribute of the parser to a welcome message string.
Use the add_argument method to define a positional argument named 'size'.
Set the type parameter of the size argument to string.
Set the choices parameter to the keys of the sizes constant to restrict valid inputs.
Add a help text string describing the size argument.
Call the parse_args method on the parser object and store the result in a variable named parsed_args.
Define a second positional argument named 'crust' using add_argument.
Set the choices for the crust argument to the keys of the crusts constant.
Add help text for the crust argument describing the type of pizza crust.
Define an optional argument for extra cheese using double dashes (e.g., --extra-cheese).
Set the action parameter to 'store_true' to treat the argument as a boolean flag.
Set the dest parameter to 'cheese' to store the flag value in a shorter variable name.
Define an optional argument for extra sauce using double dashes (e.g., --extra-sauce).
Set the action parameter to 'store_true' for the extra sauce argument.
Set the dest parameter to 'sauce' for the extra sauce argument.
Define an optional argument for toppings using a short flag (-t) and a long flag (--toppings).
Set the type parameter for toppings to string.
Set the nargs parameter to '+' to allow one or more toppings to be passed as a list.
Add help text for the toppings argument.
Access the parsed arguments using dot notation (e.g., parsed_args.size) instead of dictionary keys.
Update the build_pizza function to accept the namespace object returned by parse_args.
Retrieve the size and crust values from the namespace object using dot notation.
Check if the toppings attribute exists and is not None before adding toppings to the pizza string.
Check the cheese attribute from the namespace object to conditionally add extra cheese.
Check the sauce attribute from the namespace object to conditionally add extra sauce.
Call the build_pizza function with the parsed_args object and print the resulting pizza description.
